wash-basins.title: Wash Basins
wash-basins.content:
Premium Stone Wash Basin Designs for Modern Home

Stone Wash Basin - Luxury and Durability Combined

Elevate your bathroom with a Indian natural stone wash basin from Stone World. Crafted with precision from high-quality natural stone, marble and granite, our wash basins offer not only style but also exceptional durability, perfect for modern and luxury interiors.

Get a Free Quote

Natural Stone WashBasin - A Timeless Choice

A natural stone wash basin brings a touch of elegance to your space. Available in various stones like marble, granite and sandstone, our basins are:

  • Resistant to stains and scratches
  • Easy to clean and maintain
  • Perfect for both traditional and contemporary designs

The natural textures and patterns of stone add a unique charm to every basin, making each piece one of a kind.

Request Price Details

Marble Wash Basin - The Epitome of Elegance

Our marble wash basins are perfect for those who want timeless luxury. With intricate veins and polished finishes, these basins are ideal for high-end bathrooms, resorts and hotels.

  • Available in a range of colors
  • Smooth and sleek surface
  • High resistance to wear and tear
  • Available In White Marble & Other Colors.
Request a Callback

Granite Wash Basin - Modern and Practical

Granite wash basins are known for their toughness and aesthetic appeal. Whether you prefer a sleek modern look or a more traditional feel, granite provides both beauty and longevity.

  • Resistant to moisture and temperature changes
  • Ideal for busy family bathrooms and commercial spaces
  • Available in various finishes, including polished and matte
Send Your Requirements

Upgrade your bathroom or powder room with a handcrafted stone wash basin. Available in stone, wood and gemstone finishes, these basins bring durability and a natural charm to any space. Explore designs that blend function with modern aesthetics.

Elegant Unique Stone Wash Basins for Every Space















Lets Connect On Whatsapp

Why Choose Stone World for Wash Basins?

Upgrade your bathroom with the beauty and functionality of Stone World’s stone, marble and granite wash basins. Designed to combine elegance with durability, our basins elevate everyday spaces with timeless appeal.

Premium-Quality Materials

We use high-grade materials that not only enhance the visual appeal of your space but also ensure long-lasting performance.

Customization to Fit Your Space

Whether you need a compact basin for a powder room or a statement piece for a luxury bathroom, we offer custom sizes and shapes to match your needs.

Durable & Low-Maintenance

Our stone basins are resistant to stains, water damage and wear making them easy to clean and perfect for long-term use.

Variety of Designs & Finishes

Choose from a wide range of finishes, textures and edge styles to complement both contemporary and traditional interiors.

stone-veneers.title: Stone Veneers
stone-veneers.content:
Stone Veneers

Stone Veneers - Lightweight Elegance for Every Space

Bring the timeless beauty of stone to your walls, floors, and facades with stone veneers from Stone World. Our veneers offer the authentic look and texture of natural stone, combined with lightweight flexibility, making them ideal for a variety of applications.

Flexible Stone Veneer - Versatile & Durable

Flexible stone veneer is a game-changer in architectural design. With its thin, lightweight nature, it’s perfect for covering curved surfaces and intricate spaces. Use flexible stone veneer for:

  • Curved walls & columns
  • Custom installations in homes & offices
  • Artistic wall accents

These veneers maintain the durability and elegance of stone while allowing for creative freedom in design.

Natural Stone Veneer Sheets - Authentic Stone Beauty

Our natural stone veneer sheets are crafted from high-quality stone slabs, offering the perfect balance of style and strength. These sheets can be used for:

  • Feature walls
  • Flooring and countertops
  • Facades and exterior applications

     

Available in a variety of colors, textures, and finishes, these veneer sheets bring sophistication to both modern and traditional spaces.

Stone Veneer in India - Customizable & Affordable

Stone veneer in India has become a popular choice due to its affordability, ease of installation, and environmental benefits. At Stone World, we offer a range of options suited to any project’s scale and budget.

Send Your Requirements

Upgrade your interiors with lightweight and flexible stone veneers made from real natural stone. These slim sheets come in a variety of textures, colors, and finishes like metal inlay, rust, and gold leaf. Ideal for walls, columns, doors, ceilings, and even furniture.

Why Choose Stone World for Stone Veneers?

Revamp your interiors and exteriors with Stone World’s range of flexible and natural stone veneers. Lightweight, durable, and versatile, our veneers offer the perfect blend of natural aesthetics and modern functionality.

Premium-Quality Materials

We use high-grade natural stone to ensure every veneer sheet maintains its authentic look, durability, and structural integrity.

Fully Customizable Options

Our veneers are available in a variety of textures and tones, with customization options to perfectly match your design vision and space requirements.

Easy Installation & Low Maintenance

Designed for hassle-free application, our stone veneers are lightweight and require minimal upkeep — ideal for both professionals and DIY projects.

Versatile Applications

Whether you’re upgrading a feature wall, fireplace, façade, or reception area, our veneers bring character and charm to any surface.

raw-ceramic-jaalis.title: Raw Ceramic Jaalis
raw-ceramic-jaalis.content:
Raw Ceramic Jaalis

Raw Ceramic Jaalis - Functional Aesthetics with Earthy Charm

Create naturally ventilated and beautifully lit spaces with raw ceramic jaalis from Stone World. Made using traditional firing methods and clay-based materials, these jaalis add organic warmth and character to any architecture.

Earthy Designs, Natural Finish

Unlike glazed ceramic, raw ceramic jaalis retain their original terracotta texture and earthy color. These are perfect for:

  • Heritage-style buildings
  • Rustic villas
  • Courtyard walls
  • Indoor-outdoor partitions

     

Each jaali is handmade and customizable in various sizes and patterns.

Ideal for Facades, Windows & Partitions

Raw ceramic jaalis allow air and light to pass through while offering privacy and shade. They’re widely used in:

  • Traditional and modern facades
  • Temple or pooja room windows
  • Semi-open balconies
  • Office cabin dividers

Benefits of Raw Ceramic Jaalis

  • Natural insulation
  • Eco-friendly & breathable material
  • Adds ventilation and privacy
  • Weather-resistant & low maintenance

These jaalis are not just functional – they’re timeless design elements rooted in Indian architectural tradition.

Send Your Requirements

Add style and ventilation to your space with handcrafted raw ceramic jaalis. These 2D and 3D perforated screens bring a balance of privacy, airflow, and decorative appeal – perfect for both modern and traditional architecture.

Choose raw ceramic jaalis from Stone World to bring tradition, airflow, and beauty together in one timeless design. Our handcrafted pieces blend aesthetics with function, perfect for enhancing both modern and traditional architecture.

100% Handcrafted with Quality Control

Every jaali is meticulously handmade and undergoes strict quality checks to ensure strength, symmetry, and long-lasting performance.

Diverse Pattern Selection

We offer a wide variety of jaali designs to suit your architectural style — whether it’s ethnic, minimalistic, or a fusion of both.

gold-leafing-on-stones.title: Gold Leafing on Stones
gold-leafing-on-stones.content:

Gold Leaf on Stone - A Touch of Royal Craftsmanship

Add a luxurious shimmer to your space with gold leafing on stone, crafted by skilled artisans at Stone World. From mandirs to modern walls, this traditional technique adds richness, depth, and a unique personality to every surface.

Make your interiors stand out with gold and copper detailing on natural stone. Whether it’s a spiritual corner or an accent wall, gold leaf on stone instantly elevates the aesthetic with a royal finish that speaks of fine taste.

Copper & Gold Leaf Finish - Old-World Meets Contemporary

Our stone gold leaf finish isn’t just about looks – it’s a blend of heritage and durability. Applied using age-old techniques with a modern touch, the leafing is sealed to ensure lasting brilliance across all applications.

Hand-Applied Leafing - Precision Craft, Every Time

Every piece goes through a careful process of surface prep, adhesive layering, and gold foil application. Whether you’re looking for minimal shimmer or bold accents, our hand-applied gold leafing ensures an even, radiant finish.

Perfect for Spiritual & Designer Spaces

From how to apply gold leaf on stone to choosing the right base material, we assist with everything. Our leafing work is ideal for:

  • Mandirs and altars
  • Designer wall panels
  • Stone sculptures and idols
  • Entrance and focal wall features

 Add a divine glow and timeless appeal to your interiors with gold & copper leafing on stone. Only at Stone World.

Send Your Requirements

Add a luxurious finish to your interiors with gold leaf on stone. This decorative detailing blends tradition with elegance, turning plain surfaces into stunning highlights. Perfect for feature walls, temple backdrops, and premium decor accents.

gemstones.title: Gemstones

Our natural gemstone range includes:

brick-claddings.title: Brick Claddings
brick-claddings.content:
Brick Wall Claddings

Achieve the Classic Look with Authentic Brick Cladding

Brick cladding offers a timeless aesthetic that brings warmth, character, and a touch of rustic elegance to any architectural design. At Stone World, we provide an extensive range of premium brick cladding solutions, meticulously crafted to replicate the authentic look and feel of traditional brickwork. Whether you’re aiming for an industrial chic vibe, a cozy farmhouse feel, or a classic urban appeal, our brick cladding allows you to achieve stunning results without the complexities of full brick construction.

Explore Brick Cladding for Exterior and Interior Walls

Our collection includes solutions for every vision. For a dramatic transformation, consider brick cladding exterior applications. It’s an excellent way to enhance curb appeal, adding a durable and visually appealing layer to your home or commercial building. Imagine a classic red brick facade or a modern grey brick exterior that stands out.

Likewise, interior brick cladding can instantly add character and warmth to living rooms, kitchens, bedrooms, or commercial spaces. Use it to create a stunning accent wall, define an area, or infuse an industrial loft aesthetic. Our range of brick cladding tile options provides diverse colors, textures, and finishes to perfectly match your design aspirations.

Discover the enduring appeal and practical benefits of Stone World’s brick cladding and bring the classic beauty of brick into your project with ease.

Send Your Requirements

Add timeless appeal to your walls with classic brick cladding. Ideal for both interiors and exteriors, brick brings texture, warmth, and a rustic charm to any space. Explore our collection for a look that’s both traditional and stylish.

Classic Brick Cladding Ideas for Walls














Lets Connect On Whatsapp

Why Choose Brick Wall Cladding?

Opting for brick wall cladding presents numerous advantages for both new constructions and renovations:

Authentic Appearance

Our cladding faithfully reproduces the texture, color variations, and irregular charm of real bricks, creating an incredibly realistic finish.

Versatility

Ideal for a myriad of applications, from creating striking feature walls to revamping entire facades.

Ease of Installation

Significantly lighter and thinner than full bricks, brick cladding is easier and quicker to install, saving time and labor costs.

Durability

Made from robust materials, our brick cladding is designed to withstand the test of time, resisting wear and tear, and maintaining its beauty for years.

Space-Saving

Its slim profile makes it perfect for adding a brick aesthetic where space is a constraint, allowing for more usable interior area.

bamboo-wash-basins.title: Bamboo Wash Basins
bamboo-wash-basins.content:
Bamboo Wash Basins

Embrace Eco-Friendly Design with a Bamboo Wash Basin

In modern interior design, sustainability and unique aesthetics go hand-in-hand. A bamboo wash basin offers a perfect blend of both, providing an eco-conscious yet stylish solution for your bathroom. At Stone World, we are proud to present a collection of bamboo basins that bring a touch of natural warmth and contemporary charm to any washroom setting. Far from traditional materials, bamboo provides a fresh, organic alternative that stands out.

Perfecting Your Basin Countertop with Bamboo

A basin countertop paired with a bamboo wash basin creates a harmonious and inviting space. The inherent warmth of bamboo contrasts beautifully with cooler tones often found in bathroom tiles and fixtures, creating a balanced and appealing design. Our countertop bamboo basins are designed to be focal points, bringing an element of nature indoors.

Whether you’re renovating your entire bathroom or simply looking to upgrade your basin, our bamboo wash basin collection offers a sustainable, stylish, and durable choice. Explore StoneWorld’s range and infuse your bathroom with the natural elegance and calm of bamboo.

Send Your Requirements

Bring a natural touch to your space with a handcrafted bamboo wash basin. Known for its durability and water-resistant resin finish, bamboo makes a unique and eco-friendly choice. Explore our stylish collection for a warm, earthy upgrade.

Stylish & Sustainable Bamboo Wash Basins Design




Lets Connect On Whatsapp

Why Choose a Bamboo Wash Basin for Your Bathroom?

Opting for a bamboo wash basin for your bathroom wash basin needs comes with a host of benefits:

Eco-Friendly Material

Bamboo is a highly renewable resource, growing rapidly and requiring minimal water, making it an excellent choice for environmentally conscious homeowners.

Unique Aesthetics

The natural grain and warm tones of bamboo create a distinct, calming, and naturally beautiful look that complements a variety of bathroom styles, from minimalist to spa-like.

Durability & Resilience

Despite its lightweight appearance, bamboo is incredibly strong and durable, capable of withstanding daily use in a bathroom environment.

Lightweight & Easy to Install

Compared to heavier stone or ceramic basins, bamboo basins are often lighter, simplifying installation.

Naturally Hygienic

Bamboo possesses natural antimicrobial properties, contributing to a cleaner bathroom environment.

Imagine the character it can bring to a patio wall or an outdoor living space.

The Unrivaled Appeal of Wooden Wall Cladding

Our wooden wall cladding made from antique boat wood offers distinct advantages that set it apart:

Unique Aesthetics

The weathered patina, original nail holes, and varied color tones of reclaimed boat wood create an aesthetic that cannot be replicated with new materials. Every plank is unique.

Sustainability

We create one-of-a-kind designs that match your vision—whether you prefer bold statement walls or subtle, sophisticated backdrops.

Exceptional Durability

Versatility

Ideal for feature walls, accent panels, commercial spaces, and more, providing a rich, textured backdrop.
